name: Is attorney-client privilege broken if lawyer inputs my info to ChatGPT?
description: Yes, waived; insist on secure alternatives.

mainEntity.name: Is attorney-client privilege broken if lawyer inputs my info to ChatGPT?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, waived; insist on secure alternatives.
acceptedAnswer.description: Yes, likely waives privilege. Context: Communications to third parties unprotected; AI not confidential. Key factors: Public vs. private AI, data retention policies. Practical guidance: Lawyer must use secure tools only, get waiver first. Courts ruling against in cases.
